description: Global corporate wellness platform giving employees access to gyms, studios, personal trainers, and wellness apps. 90,000+ partner locations worldwide. Rebranded from Gympass to Wellhub in 2023.
business_model: B2B2C - Companies pay platform fee, employees pay subsidized subscription
target_market: Mid-to-large enterprises globally, strong presence in Latin America, US, and Europe
key_investors: General Atlantic, Softbank, Moore Strategic Ventures, Valor Capital
competitive_advantage: Largest gym network globally, proven ROI (35% healthcare cost reduction), strong engagement rates

varden_fit.rationale: Complementary to Varden's occupational health - could bundle physical + medical wellness
